title: Onboarding - Organized - Allow "Poly Lens" to use your location window [Android]
scenario: Location permission dialog appears when tapping "Enable now" on the Organized onboarding screen in Poly Lens
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Tap "Enable now" on the Organized screen.
5. Observe the location permission dialog that appears.
expected: The location permission dialog for Poly Lens should display with the text "Allow Poly Lens to use your location" and options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", or "Don't allow". The user remains on the Organized page in the background.
